tests.name: NodesPanel renders nothing while closed
NodesPanel shows node labels with their current colors
NodesPanel renders node entries inside a divided list
NodesPanel renders node entries without subtitles
NodesPanel posts node visibility updates when a toggle changes
NodesPanel falls back to default node colors and visibility and wires the close button
LegendsPanel shows node and edge color controls when open
LegendsPanel keeps the legend body scrollable when the content grows
LegendsPanel debounces color updates from the node and edge sections
LegendsPanel flushes a pending color change when the picker loses focus
LegendsPanel renders the rules editor when open
LegendsPanel shows plugin default legend rules without exposing delete controls
LegendsPanel collapses the node and edge legend sections independently
LegendsPanel creates a new legend rule through the node and edge sections
LegendsPanel renders custom edge rules inside the edges section
LegendsPanel does not render the old left-border bar styling on custom rows
LegendsPanel keeps custom node rules removable and toggleable inside the nodes section
LegendsPanel toggles plugin default legend visibility through a dedicated message
LegendsPanel reorders node legend rules through drag and drop
LegendsPanel reorders edge legend rules through drag and drop
LegendsPanel calls onClose when the close button is clicked
EdgesPanel renders nothing while closed
EdgesPanel shows edge labels with their current colors
EdgesPanel renders edge entries inside a divided list
EdgesPanel posts edge visibility updates when a toggle changes
EdgesPanel falls back to default edge colors and visibility and wires the close button
PluginsPanel returns null when the panel is closed
PluginsPanel shows an empty-state message when no plugins are registered
PluginsPanel renders the plugin priority hint and plugin rows without connection counts
PluginsPanel calls onClose when the close button is clicked
PluginsPanel posts a plugin toggle message when the plugin switch changes
PluginsPanel renders plugin-only rows without per-source content
PluginsPanel posts a plugin-order message when rows are dragged into a new order
PluginsPanel renders plugin rows inside the shared divided list style
ExportPanel returns null when the panel is closed
ExportPanel renders export sections in the shared popup layout
ExportPanel posts image and graph export messages from the shared list rows
ExportPanel renders plugin exporter groups and posts plugin export messages
ExportPanel calls onClose from the popup close button
ExportPanel groups plugin exporters by plugin label and group label
ExportPanel builds stable keys for exporter items
app/PanelStack renders the requested panel and keeps the node details slot mounted
app/PanelStack shows corner controls only when no right panel is open and nodes exist
app/PanelStack renders the settings panel when it is active
app/PanelStack renders the export panel when it is active
app/PanelStack renders the nodes panel when it is active
app/PanelStack renders the edges panel when it is active
app/PanelStack renders the legends panel when it is active
